overview: Luxury 3D animated portfolio website for Nidhi Bhatia, Bridal Makeup Artist based in Lucknow. Features a premium dark-themed design with Three.js particle effects, glow and blur aesthetics, celebrity endorsement section, full services showcase, Indian testimonials, FAQ, and embedded Google Maps — designed to attract high-end bridal clients.
features: Full 3D animated hero with floating particles and orbs
Premium dark theme with gold/rose-gold glow effects
9 real portfolio photos displayed in 3D gallery
Google Maps embed for studio location
Floating WhatsApp call button and Instagram button
